proposed_benchmarks.name: Immersion v1.0
proposed_benchmarks.what: Ultra-dense viewpoint indoor dataset designed to break the 'sparsity shield' in current 3DGS benchmarks.

proposed_benchmarks.name: WorldMark
proposed_benchmarks.paper_title: WorldMark: Interactive Video World Model Benchmark Suite
proposed_benchmarks.domain: Interactive video world models (Genie / YUME / HY-World / Matrix-Game 등)
proposed_benchmarks.what: Previously each system evaluated on private scenes → unified suite for cross-comparison.
proposed_benchmarks.risk_note: 프로토콜 설계 주체의 독립성 확인 필요

proposed_benchmarks.name: VLA Open-World Eval (How VLAs Really Work)
proposed_benchmarks.paper_title: How VLAs (Really) Work In Open-World Environments
proposed_benchmarks.what: Fixed eval suite to compare openvla·pi0·GR00T under matched conditions; identifies which factors actually produce generalization.

notable_datasets.name: Open-H-Embodiment
notable_datasets.what: Cross-modality / cross-task / cross-embodiment 의료 로봇 foundation-scale 데이터셋

note: 오늘 표준 벤치(ScanNet / LIBERO / nuScenes / MMMU / VBench 등)에서 새 SOTA 수치 보고 없음. 대신 '새 벤치마크·새 데이터셋 제안' 흐름이 강함.
